name: memory
description: Curated cross-session agent memory + memory/recall_memory tools + <memory-context> injection + opt-in auto-summarize + daily archive-only curation cron. Scope tabs (user/workspace/summaries), pin/unpin, per-scope budget bars.
notes: v0.2 (step 2.10) adds: opt-in per-thread auto-summarize (settings.memoryAutoSummarize, default OFF — spends the user's own BYOK; scheduled off-turn via memoryAutoSummary.maybeSummarize, NEVER inline; watermark >30 msgs or >12k chars since last summary), a daily archive-only curation cron (memoryCuration.curateMemories — dead-thread/90d-stale summaries + exact dupes; pinned bypasses), and a fuller MemoryPanel (user/workspace/summaries scope tabs, pin/unpin, per-scope budget bars). Consumer must add: settings.memoryAutoSummarize field, the curate-memory cron line, and (optional) a threads.sendMessage scheduler hook to maybeSummarize. Vector/semantic recall is a later phase (embedding column reserved). memory tool description IS the learning loop (save on corrections/preferences, skip task progress).
